description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tbd-sim-tapp-tbd4vcv-linux that runs on a workflow dispatch. Use an ubuntu-18.04 job to check out the repository and submodules, install dependencies including Boost and Rack-SDK, build the tapp, simulator, and tbd4vcv projects with CMake, and archive the binaries into a single zip file. Upload the zip file as a workflow artifact named binaries.zip.
